title: Toggle Light and Dark Mode in Doc View Only

posts.author: belperez (Bel Perez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Monday.com Community,

I hope everyone is doing well. I have a feature request that I wanted to bring up for discussion, and I am curious to know if others share the same interest.

Feature Request: Toggle Light and Dark Mode in Doc View Only

Currently, the light and dark mode in Monday.com can be toggled for the entire workspace. While this is a great feature, I believe it would be even more useful if we could also toggle between light and dark mode on an individual doc basis. This would enable users to switch between modes directly within a monday.doc without affecting the entire workspace.

I am not sure if this feature has been requested before, but I wanted to bring it up to see if others in the community find it helpful as well. If this has already been discussed or is in development, I apologize for the repetition and would appreciate any updates.
